title: Comte and Fluffy Galette
description: A unique Japanese-inspired dessert featuring a comte-infused galette and fluffy accompaniment.
instructions: Roll out the galette dough to a thickness of about 1/8 inch.
Transfer the dough to a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
In a small bowl, mix together the comte, honey, and matcha powder.
Spread the comte mixture evenly over the dough, leaving a 1-inch border.
Fold the edges of the dough up over the filling, pressing gently to seal.
Brush the dough with a little water and sprinkle with granulated sugar.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown.
While the galette is baking, whip the vanilla cream until stiff peaks form.
Once the galette is done, let it cool for a few minutes before slicing and serving with the whipped cream.
